epics.title: add-epic --link accepts malformed format silently; update-epic has no --link flag to fix it
Epic-hierarchy orchestration — run a parent epic's children unattended (see docs/vision/2026-07-14-autonomy-orchestration-vision.md, section B)
Portfolio/architecture-consistency scanning across the backlog (see docs/vision/2026-07-14-autonomy-orchestration-vision.md, section C — least-scoped of the three, needs its own brainstorm)

links.reason: C presumes B's hierarchy execution exists to propagate cross-cutting decisions into

epics.title: Wire infra-runbook preflight (~/Servers/infra-playbooks) into pm's epic/hierarchy preflight (see docs/vision/2026-07-14-autonomy-orchestration-vision.md, section D — cheapest of the three, existing convention just needs wiring)
pm plugin improvements from three dogfooding sessions (2026-07-14) — see docs/feedback/2026-07-14-pm-plugin-improvement-feedback.md
Flip gate-guard default to ON for epics with reconcileOnResume — reverses the deliberate opt-in choice, approved after real-usage feedback showed it's never been turned on
Auto-detect an unlogged minimal detour from commit/diff shape and log it without a manual /pm:detour --minimal invocation — 3 sessions converge on this, user's #1 priority
Add a remove-epic (or soft-delete/archive-with-reason) CLI verb — the only current recovery from a mis-registered epic is a raw git checkout
Fix missing() to exclude status===archived — an already-closed epic can show an unresolvable '⚠ no change on disk' warning forever
Reconciler returns a structured {valid, amendments} verdict AND writes it back onto the relevant link — currently the judgment only ever lives in conversation
Add a real per-repo lane-routing override mechanism (state.json config) instead of requiring a CLAUDE.md prose carve-out when the generic heuristic is wrong for a repo
Investigate why epic-level autonomy and epic-hierarchy orchestration show zero real-world usage in at least one dogfooding repo — ceremony weight vs discoverability vs genuinely not needed
log-detour/resume print the exact ready-to-copy Honcho memory string (and keep a local log of what was emitted) instead of asking the agent to compose and silently one-way-write it
Add a verify-state command that fails loudly if state.json's mtime is newer than the last render's stamp, catching an undetected hand-edit mechanically
Extend plan-hierarchy's depends-on topological sort to top-level queued epics generally, not just parent/child hierarchies — the same starvation problem exists at the top-level queue
Let a single epic/detour override set-review-mode's repo-global dial to thorough without flipping the whole repo's mode
Add startedAt/completedAt timestamps to epics, and surface a staleness/days-active indicator in PROJECT.md and /pm:next — supports velocity tracking and the weekly Ship-Real-Software check
Add a category-based --preauthorize shorthand (e.g. "category:filesystem") to epic-level autonomy, instead of requiring every routine action to be enumerated individually

Clarify the epic-level-autonomy decision rule's wording so WARN-class decisions are --notify'd incrementally as they happen, not just gathered for the end-of-epic report — a compaction-safety fix using the mechanism that already exists

Investigate a mechanism for cross-repo epic dependencies — links currently only reference epics within one repo, but real cross-repo dependencies exist (e.g. a deploy epic depending on infra-playbooks conventions)
Show the top 2-3 changelog bullets inline in the SessionStart upgrade nudge, instead of requiring a separate /pm:changelog round trip to decide if upgrading is worth mid-epic churn
